allow: Bash(node -e "const m = require\('msedge-tts'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\(typeof m.MsEdgeTTS\); console.log\(typeof m.OUTPUT_FORMAT\);")

Bash(node -e "const { MsEdgeTTS, OUTPUT_FORMAT } = require\('msedge-tts'\); const t = new MsEdgeTTS\(\); t.setMetadata\('en-US-GuyNeural', OUTPUT_FORMAT.AUDIO_24KHZ_96KBITRATE_MONO_MP3\).then\(\(\) => t.toFile\(require\('os'\).tmpdir\(\), 'hello test'\)\).then\(r => { console.log\('TYPE:', typeof r\); console.log\('VALUE:', JSON.stringify\(r, null, 2\)\); console.log\('KEYS:', r && typeof r === 'object' ? Object.keys\(r\) : 'n/a'\); }\).catch\(e => console.log\('ERR:', e.message\)\)")
